description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly white base and light blue overlays, including the toe cap, eyelets, heel, and outsole. The shoe features a playful black smiley face logo on the lateral side, adding a whimsical touch to its urban style. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated fabric, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces in matching blue, and the midsole is white with a blue outsole that provides traction. The overall design is clean and modern, with smooth surfaces and minimal texturing. The shoe looks unworn and in pristine condition, suitable for casual streetwear.
description: A white and light blue low-top sneaker with a smiley face logo on the side, featuring smooth synthetic materials and standard lacing. The shoe is clean, modern, and appears brand new.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smiley face logo on the lateral side, blue overlays, and white base.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the toe box, lacing system, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the smiley face logo visible, showing the shoe's profile and heel structure.
description_view_3: Rear angled view displaying the heel counter, collar padding, and partial side details.
attribute_logo: A black smiley face on the lateral side of the shoe.
